'''079''' was the designation of the [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunter]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that was used by [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] in the years following [[Gender/Legends|her]] service as an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] and during her time as a part of [[Talon Karrde]]'s organization. [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] used the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] for a time, most notably when he defended the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] from a flight of two-headed creatures sent by the [[Force ghost/Legends|spirit]] of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]]
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stID|079|in book}}
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Backlash (audiobook)}}
